data.title: Tom Holland Confirms Spider-Man 4 Filming For Summer 2025: What To Expect
data.description: Tom Holland confirms Spider-Man 4 will begin filming in summer 2025, continuing Peter Parker's story after No Way Home.

data.title: PayPal Expands Partnership With Global Payments, Fastlane Checkout To Boost E-Commerce
data.description: PayPal and Global Payments team up to improve checkout experiences, increase conversion rates, and offer diverse payment solutions for merchants.

data.title: Check Out What Whales Are Doing With OXY
What's Going On With Snap Stock Wednesday?
data.description: JMP Securities analyst Andrew Boone upgraded Snap from a Market Perform rating to a Market Outperform rating and announced a $17 price target.

data.title: Norfolk Southern's Q3 Beat Fuels Analyst Optimism Despite Q4 Challenges—Long-Term Growth Potential In Focus
data.description: Analysts revise Norfolk Southern's price target following Q3 results, with higher EPS estimates and expectations for operational improvements.
